mapper.insert: insert into batch.config_release ( tenant_id, config_type, config_key, config_name, config_status, version_no, gray_scope, config_payload, effective_from_at, effective_to_at, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{configType}, #{configKey}, #{configName}, #{configStatus}, #{versionNo}, #{grayScopeJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{configPayloadJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR}::jsonb, #{effectiveFromAt}, #{effectiveToAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, current_timestamp, current_timestamp )
mapper.update: update batch.config_release set config_status = #{nextStatus}, published_at = coalesce(#{publishedAt}, published_at), rolled_back_at = coalesce(#{rolledBackAt}, rolled_back_at), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{releaseId}
